title_suggestions: I Lost $80k on a Rug Pull: 5 Red Flags You're Ignoring
How to Spot a Scam Before It Steals Your Crypto
The Truth About Rug Pulls (My $80,000 Mistake)
youtube_videos.thumbnail_concept: Distressed face, red 'SCAMMED' stamp over a falling chart.
youtube_videos.hook_script: I watched eighty thousand dollars vanish in under 48 hours. I ignored five specific red flags. Today, I'm showing you exactly how to spot them before they take your money.
youtube_videos.angle_thesis: Educate viewers on identifying scam tokens by analyzing liquidity locks and developer transparency.

core_points: The emotional toll of a rug pull
Anonymous team with no track record
chapters.b_roll_and_visuals: Screen recording of a shady DexScreener chart.

title_suggestions: Why 90% of Layer 2s Will Be Dead by 2027
The L2 Collapse: What Every Investor Needs to Know
Is Your L2 Investment About to Go to Zero?
youtube_videos.thumbnail_concept: Comparison chart showing many L2 logos fading away.
youtube_videos.hook_script: Most people think Layer 2 is the future, but I believe 90% of these projects will be dead by 2027. Here is the brutal reality of the L2 consolidation coming our way.
youtube_videos.angle_thesis: Analyze market saturation and capital inefficiency leading to a 'survival of the fittest' phase for Layer 2 networks.

chapters.b_roll_and_visuals: Fast-paced montage of various L2 logos.

title_suggestions: How I Turned $500 into $40,000 (The Memecoin Blueprint)

youtube_videos.hook_script: I turned five hundred dollars into forty thousand in just three weeks. It wasn't luck; it was a specific memecoin strategy that I'm breaking down for you right now.
youtube_videos.angle_thesis: Provide a step-by-step roadmap for identifying high-potential memecoins using social sentiment and volume metrics.
